violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/09/2025

Rice, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Rice was voluntarily disposed of. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Chlorine sanitizer solution was in excess of (200) parts per million (ppm). A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be applied at the strength of 50-100 ppm. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Noodles was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Corrective Action - Noodles were only in the unit for a short period. Noodles were moved to sheet pans, in a sinlge layer for rapid cooling. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024

Reduced Oxygen packaged fish was observed thawing with out oxygen being allowed back into the package. Reduced oxygen packaged fish must have oxygen allowed back in prior to thawing. Fish was 35 Degrees. Packages were sliced open. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2024
Food items were observed stored on the floor in the walk in cooler. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/08/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 06/13/2024
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy and prep unit in the kitchen by the cooking line. New Violation. Correct By: 07/06/2024
